{"id":"project-LICHEN-i9r0.2","title":"Simulator: TDMA time model","description":"Add TDMA slot timing to simulator.

## Changes
1. Superframe clock in simulation time
2. Nodes track assigned slot, TX only in slot
3. Model beacon reception and sync
4. Model clock drift and guard time

## Validation
- Verify zero collisions when all nodes are synced
- Measure throughput vs ALOHA/CSMA at density
- Model sync loss and recovery","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:45.208903Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:45.208903Z","labels":["simulator","python","phy","protocol","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-i9r0.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-i9r0","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:45.364558Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-i9r0.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-i9r0.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:45.498273Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
